description: Data manifest for Sensory Atlas. Describes all data files, their purpose, format, and which system components read them.

parser_compat_root.note: These files are copies kept at data/ root for parser.py backward compatibility. parser.py hardcodes data/sensory_axis_descriptors.json and data/sensory_modifier_groups.json. Do not remove until parser.py is updated to use paths.py.

data/core.purpose: Parser runtime data. Files read directly by the parser pipeline on every inference call.

sensory_objects.jsonl.notes: Primary ontology. Each line is one sensory object with object_role and core_axes.

phrase_cues.json.notes: Phrase-level cue boosts per object. Every object in sensory_objects.jsonl should have an entry.

cue_hierarchy.json.schema: { group_id: { positive_cues, negative_cues, boost_objects, penalize_objects, axis_updates } }
cue_hierarchy.json.notes: Contextual cue groups for resolving surface keyword vs. context conflicts.

data/evaluation.purpose: Evaluation datasets. Read by the CLI evaluate command and ui_helpers.

test_sentences_20.jsonl.notes: default dataset — ontology sanity check. Expressions close to object labels and examples.

blind_test_sentences_30.jsonl.notes: blind dataset — phrase-level generalization. Avoids direct object names.

holdout_test_sentences_50.jsonl.notes: holdout dataset — stricter metaphor generalization. Intentionally hard. Do not tune parser against this set.

data/vocabulary.purpose: Reference vocabulary and extended ontology descriptors. Not read by parser at inference time.

sensory_axis_descriptors.json.schema: { version, description, axes: { axis_name: { definition, descriptors } } }
sensory_axis_descriptors.json.notes: Extended axis vocabulary (17 axes). Use axis_mapping.json to map extended → canonical parser axes.

axis_mapping.json.notes: Mapping layer from extended axis vocabulary to the 10 parser canonical axes.

sensory_modifier_groups.json.notes: Modifier group taxonomy for vocabulary annotation.

sensory_expression_patterns.jsonl.notes: Expression pattern library for ontology expansion and cue design.

general_sensory_vocabulary.csv.notes: General sensory vocabulary seed for phrase cue expansion.

domain_vocabulary_seed.csv.notes: Domain-specific vocabulary seed (fragrance, taste, texture) for ontology seeding.

domain_mapping.json.notes: Cross-domain sensory mapping (fragrance ↔ taste ↔ texture) for future recommendation layer.

data/workflow.purpose: Candidate object review workflow artifacts. Read by candidate_workflow.py and CLI review commands.

sensory_object_candidates.jsonl.notes: Candidate pool for new sensory objects. Records here are not yet in the ontology.

candidate_review_status.jsonl.notes: Review status for each candidate. Drives CLI review-candidates command output.

curated_candidate_shortlist_v1_5.jsonl.notes: Curated shortlist from v1.5 batch. Candidates approved for promotion review.

data/regression.purpose: Regression and failure case datasets for parser analysis.

dev_failure_cases.jsonl.notes: Curated failure cases from holdout evaluation. Used for regression tracking across parser versions.

ontology_expansion_v1_5_cases.jsonl.notes: Cases that motivated the v1.5 ontology expansion batch.
